description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, single-story structure with a gently sloped shed roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The front facade features four large, vertically-planked wooden doors, each with prominent black metal hinges and handles, suggesting individual stalls or bays. The side and rear walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving the building a rustic, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible windows or ventilation features on any side, emphasizing a simple, functional design. The overall color palette consists of natural wood tones and a contrasting red roof. The sturdy construction and lack of decorative elements indicate a focus on practicality and durability.
description: A rectangular wooden cowshed with a red sloped roof and four large front doors, built for utility and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing four large wooden doors with black metal hinges and a red sloped roof.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the long, plain wooden wall and the sloped roof extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid, unbroken wooden wall with no doors or windows.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain wooden wall and the roof's slope.
attribute_door_style: double-hinged wooden plank doors with black metal hardware
